base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of missile_player — a projectile (missile) from 1981 galaga. Small vertical white missile fired from player ship. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small vertical white missile fired from player ship; travels straight up; limit 2 on-screen at once
